stance: Neutral Ambassador of the Andromeda Sector
vita: Raised on a trading outpost in orbit around Titan Prime, I learned to navigate complex political landscapes from an early age. My family's legacy as influential merchants and diplomats has instilled in me respect for various cultures across the galaxy.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Vor'Tak with a sleek silver armor suit, reflecting my status among their race; transparent background highlighted by starlight filtering through an ornate holographic emblem of Titan Prime.
